titleStmt.title: SII 16.318: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 318. (A.R. No. 53 of 1915.) NĀGALŪṬI, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in front of the Vīrabhadra temple.
This is dated Śaka 1546, Raktākshi, Jyēshṭha śu. 5, corresponding to 1624 A.D., May 12, (Wednesday).

It registers the construction of a gōpura towards the east and a maṇḍapa near it in the prākāra of the temple of Vīrabhadra at Lāṅggalūṭi in the region of Śrīśaila-Sidhāpuram, the consecreation of the images of Kāśī-Viśvēśvara and Kalyāṇa-Basavēśvara in it and a gift of land along with copper and bronze vessels by Bonttala Nāgiśeṭṭi of Vichchupākula-gōtra, with the approval of Sāyapanāyani Timma-nāyaka, the governor of the area.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavarṣaṁbulu 1546 Agunēṭi
raktākṣi saṁvvatsara jēṣṭa śu 5 lu śrī madrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrīvīra rāmadēvamahārāyaluṁgā
ru penugoṁḍapaṭṭaṇamaṁ
du pṛthvīsāmrājyamu cēyu
cuṁḍaṁgānu vaiśyakulapa
vitrulunnu viccupākula
gōtrōdbhavuluṁnaina boṁ
ttala nāgiśeṭṭigāri pautru
lunnuṁ peddiśeṭṭigāri putru
lunaina nāgiśeṭṭigāru ceśi
na dharmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnna
nu śrīśaila sidhāpuraṁ lāṁ
ggalūṁṭi vīrabhadruni dēvu
ḷa prākāramaṁdu tūrpuna gō

puramunnu Ā samīpama
ṁdu śilāmaṁṭṭapamunnu
gaṭṭiṁci kāśīviśvēśvaruni kalyā
ṇa basavēśvaruni pratiṣṭacēśi nai
vēdya dīpārādhanalakugānu
yētadrājyādhipatulai
na sāyapanāyani tiṁ
manāyaniṁgārki vinnapaṁ
ccēśi māḷaceruvukiṁ
dda velaṁgamāni polaṁ
lōnu varimaḍi ma 0Ø dhā
rāpūrvakaṁgānu yi
piṁci Abhiṣēkānku rā
gibiṁdelunnu naivēdya sa
marpaṇaku kaṁcupaḷya
munnu kaigavigānuṇa Probablykaigavigānunnu .

dhūpārttinni ghaṁṭanu
nnu samarppiṁstini yī dha
rrma ṁ yavaru tappaka naḍiTherēpha sign is redundant.
pināru puṇyapuruṣu
la pādālu nā śirasuna
dhariṁttunu yi dharmānaku
yavvaru hāni dalacinā
rō Ā pāpātmulu pitṛ
mātṛgōbrāṁhmaṇavadha
cēśina dōṣāna bōvuvā
ru svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇya
ṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . para
dattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapā
lanayōrmadhyē dānācchrēyōsu
pālanaṁ . dānātsvarga mavāThis
pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ pa
daṁ [.] śrīśrījēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.318 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
